name: ios-reverse-engineering
description: Extract, analyze, and reverse engineer iOS applications — IPA extraction, class-dump, API endpoint discovery, call flow tracing, security auditing, cloud credential scanning, binary reversing, SDK fingerprinting, protection detection, and dylib injection plugin generation for TrollFools.

plugins.name: ios-reverse-engineering
plugins.description: Extract and analyze iOS IPA, .app bundles, Mach-O binaries, .dylib, and .framework files using ipsw, otool, strings, radare2/rizin, and Ghidra headless. Reverse engineer iOS apps, extract HTTP API endpoints, trace call flows, analyze security patterns, deep-scan for cloud credentials, perform LLM-assisted binary reversing, fingerprint SDKs with CVE checking, detect anti-tampering protections, and generate Logos/Theos dylib injection plugins for TrollFools deployment.
